headline: Stock Market Crash Likely Won’t Hurt 5 Safe High-Yielding Dividend Kings
summary: Companies that have raised dividends for shareholders for 50 years or more are the kinds of investments passive income investors need to own. Dependability is crucial for individuals seeking to increase their annual income through dividend stock investments. The Dividend Kings are the 57 companies that have raised their dividends for at least 50 years, ... Stock Market Crash Likely Won’t Hurt 5 Safe High-Yielding Dividend Kings
